posts.author: dmvv (Dmitrij Voronov)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m currently trying to make a feature react to a viewer in a specific way. The docs say:

We pass an isViewOnly parameter in the sessionToken that you can decode to check if the user is view-only

The issue is, I never receive the token from the viewer account. Something breaks even before that during this request

image719×115 2.79 KB

As if certain permissions are missing. And instead I get this screen
image748×398 10 KB

Am I missing something obvious here?

P.S. this is a widget

Thanks

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @dmvv,

Would you be able to please fill this form adding as much information as possible to it (such as app ID, board ID, view ID, timestamps, a screen recording etc.) so that our team can take a look into it?

Looking forward to hearing from you via the form!

Cheers,
Matias
